# Team Connect

> Team Connect delivers world-class corporate team building experiences across South Africa. Based in Cape Town, we serve groups from 20 to 500+ participants at any venue, with thirteen flagship experiences designed for measurable team outcomes.

## About

Team Connect is a South African corporate team building company operating primarily in Cape Town and the Western Cape, with delivery capability nationwide. We combine expert facilitation with proven experience design to help teams communicate better, build trust, and perform under pressure.

Contact: Info@teamconnect.co.za | 082 452 2283
Location: Cape Town, South Africa

## Experiences

We offer 13 flagship team building experiences:

- [Escape Labs](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/escape-labs): High-intensity lab-style escape experience combining physical puzzles, logic problems, and AI-generated challenges. Delivered in partnership with HintHunt South Africa.
- [Culture Throwdown](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/culture-throwdown): Game-show-style experience unpacking workplace culture through competitive play.
- [Creative Collision](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/creative-collision): Creative collaboration and ideation experience.
- [Community Champions](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/community-champions): Purpose-driven team building with community impact.
- [Leadership Development](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/leadership-development): Structured leadership skill building for teams and managers.
- [Mental & Corporate Wellness](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/wellness): Wellbeing-focused corporate programmes.
- [Hybrid Challenge Series](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/hybrid-challenge): Multi-format team competitions.
- [Bespoke Experience](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/bespoke-experience): Custom-designed programmes to specific team objectives.
- [Incentive & Fun Events](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/incentive-events): Reward and celebration events for high-performing teams.
- [Conference Solutions](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/conference-solutions): Team building components integrated into corporate conferences.
- [Sports Team Dynamics](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/sports-teams): Team building specifically for sports teams and clubs.
- [The Fugitive](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/fugitive): Immersive city-wide challenge experience.
- [Amazing Race](https://www.teamconnect.co.za/amazing-race): Multi-location competitive team adventure.

## Why Team Connect

- 500+ corporate teams served
- 10+ years of facilitation experience
- Client base includes Vodacom, MTN, Standard Bank, Nedbank, Discovery, Sanlam, Ernst & Young, Capitec, Coca-Cola, Toyota SA
- Groups from 20 to 500+ participants
- Cape Town-based, delivering nationwide across South Africa
